# setProperties(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the material property’s attributes to those of the specified material property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setProperties(_ property: MDLMaterialProperty)
```

## Parameters

- **property**: The material property from which to copy data.

## Discussion

Use this method to copy data from one [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterialProperty] instance to another—for example, to make one material property of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLScatteringFunction] object match the value of another.
